activities_projects.title: Chapter Summary Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop the ability to summarize the chapter
steps: Read both parts of the chapter carefully
Identify the key events in the lives of Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
Write a summary of the chapter in 8–10 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Personality Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare the achievements of Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
steps: Write points about Evelyn Glennie’s life and achievements
Write points about Bismillah Khan’s life and achievements
Compare them in a two-column table

activities_projects.title: Musical Instrument Study
steps: Research about the shehnai instrument
Write about its origin and importance in Indian culture
List places where it is commonly played

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Development
steps: Find 8 new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a meaningful sentence

activities_projects.title: Life Lesson Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the values shown in the chapter
steps: Write how Evelyn Glennie overcame her hearing disability
Explain how dedication helped Bismillah Khan succeed
Write what students can learn from their lives

activities_projects.title: Event Sequencing Activity
steps: List important events from Evelyn Glennie's life
Arrange them in chronological order
Write one sentence explaining each event

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing
steps: Imagine a conversation between Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
Write at least 8 lines of dialogue
Include questions about music and practice

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the central theme of the chapter
steps: Think about the importance of dedication and passion in music
Write the main theme of the chapter in 4–5 sentences
Give examples from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands deeper meaning of the chapter

activities_projects.title: Music Poster Creation
activities_projects.objective: Encourage creativity and awareness about music
steps: Create a poster about the importance of music
Include pictures or drawings of musical instruments
Write a short message promoting music

activities_projects.title: Opinion Writing
steps: Write your opinion about learning music
Explain how music can influence a person’s life
Support your ideas with examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops opinion writing and reasoning skills
